who: accounting firms processing 5–15 clients per quarter
offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 clients per quarter, manual report compilation causes compliance issues. We automate report generation instead of manual report compilation using spreadsheets.
problem: Timely generation of tax withholding reports
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for sharing accounting tools
try_it: Let users try report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing client data
Streamline onboarding steps for new users
